highlighted.whyItMatters: Built-in row pagination with configurable page size and navigation controls. Use it to handle large datasets without infinite scroll or external paging UI.
A dedicated plugin renders a loading state over the grid while data is being fetched or processed, replacing custom overlays.
A new built-in theme that matches the legacy Handsontable look. Opt in when you want the modern theming system without changing the visual style users are familiar with.
Autocomplete and Dropdown editors now accept object-based key/value sources, plus new valueGetter and valueSetter options for full control over how stored values map to displayed labels.
